hacker_news.title: Google AI Pro users getting locked out of Antigravity
hacker_news.author: anticensor
hacker_news.summary: Dear Google AI Support Team, I am writing to report a critical issue with my Google AI Pro subscription and Antigravity quota management that is preventing me from using the service I am paying for. Account Details: Subscription: Google AI Pro (active ) Issue Start Date: January 22, 2026 Expected Reset Date: February 1, 2026, 3:36:33 PM Problem Description: I am experiencing a 10-day quota lockout in Antigravity, which contradicts the advertised 5-hour refresh cycle for Google AI ...

linked_context.page_title: Google AI Pro Subscription - Antigravity Quota Not Working as Advertised (10-Day Lockout Instead of 5-Hour Reset)
linked_context.page_description: Dear Google AI Support Team, I am writing to report a critical issue with my Google AI Pro subscription and Antigravity quota management that is preventing me from using the service I am paying for. Account Details: Subscription: Google AI Pro (active ) Issue Start Date: January 22, 2026 Expected Reset Date: February 1, 2026, 3:36:33 PM Problem Description: I am experiencing a 10-day quota lockout in Antigravity, which contradicts the advertised 5-hour refresh cycle for Google AI ...
linked_context.page_excerpt:
I am writing to report a critical issue with my Google AI Pro subscription and Antigravity quota management that is preventing me from using the service I am paying for.

I am experiencing a 10-day quota lockout in Antigravity, which contradicts the advertised 5-hour refresh cycle for Google AI Pro subscribers. According to the Pro plan benefits, my quota should reset every 5 hours. Instead, I have been locked out since January 22, 2026, with a reset date showing February 1, 2026 - a period of approximately 10 days.

What I Was Doing When Locked: I was performing a deep code analysis of a local repository (D:\code\claude-code-system-prompts) when I received the following error message:

According to the Pro plan benefits, my quota should reset every 5 hours. Instead, I have been locked out since January 22, 2026, with a reset date showing February 1, 2026 - a period of approximately 10 days. hacker_news.title: Real Ollama Admin UI
hacker_news.author: eriscodev
hacker_news.summary: Contribute to ollama-admin/ollama-admin development by creating an account on GitHub.
comment_highlights: Most Ollama UIs give you a chat box. Ollama Admin gives you visibility and control over what's actually happening on your GPUs: which models are loaded, how much VRAM they're consuming, how fast they're generating tokens, and whether your servers can handle one more model before running out of me...

linked_context.page_description: Contribute to ollama-admin/ollama-admin development by creating an account on GitHub.
linked_context.page_excerpt:
The infrastructure layer your Ollama servers are missing. Most Ollama UIs give you a chat box. Ollama Admin gives you visibility and control over what's actually happening on your GPUs: which models are loaded, how much VRAM they're consuming, how fast they're generating tokens, and whether your servers can handle one more model before running out of memory. It's the difference between using Ol...

Why Ollama Admin · Install · GPU Monitoring · Observable Proxy · Features · API · Development

If you're running Ollama on one GPU for personal use, you probably don't need this.

hacker_news.title: Major Aging Related Metabolic Shifts Occur Around Ages 44 and 60
hacker_news.author: LarsDu88
hacker_news.summary: Understanding the molecular changes underlying aging is important for developing biomarkers and healthy aging interventions. In this study, the authors used comprehensive multi-omics data to reveal nonlinear molecular profiles across chronological ages, highlighting two substantial variations observed around ages 40 and 60, which are linked to increased disease risks.
comment_highlights: A recent study reveals that aging doesn't happen linearly or gradually, but actually undergoes some major jumps around age 44 and 60.

linked_context.page_title: Nonlinear dynamics of multi-omics profiles during human aging - Nature Aging
linked_context.page_description: Understanding the molecular changes underlying aging is important for developing biomarkers and healthy aging interventions. In this study, the authors used comprehensive multi-omics data to reveal nonlinear molecular profiles across chronological ages, highlighting two substantial variations observed around ages 40 and 60, which are linked to increased disease risks.
linked_context.page_excerpt:
Nature Aging volume 4 , pages 1619–1634 ( 2024 ) Cite this article

Aging is a complex process associated with nearly all diseases. Understanding the molecular changes underlying aging and identifying therapeutic targets for aging-related diseases are crucial for increasing healthspan. Although many studies have explored linear changes during aging, the prevalence of aging-related diseases and mortality risk accelerates after specific time points, indicating th...

Aging is a complex and multifactorial process of physiological changes strongly associated with various human diseases, including cardiovascular diseases (CVDs), diabetes, neurodegeneration and cancer 1 . The alterations of molecules (including transcripts, proteins, metabolites and cytokines) are critically important to understand the underlying mechanism of aging and discover potential therap...

hacker_news.title: Hardening macOS (Updated to Tahoe)
hacker_news.author: ricardbejarano
hacker_news.summary: Quick and easy guide for securing macOS systems, for both laymen and security enthusiasts. Last updated for Tahoe.

linked_context.page_description: Quick and easy guide for securing macOS systems, for both laymen and security enthusiasts. Last updated for Tahoe.
linked_context.page_excerpt:
Additionally, security measures that heavily compromise usability were not included.

This guide aims to produce above-average secure systems, without giving up features .

Install a fresh copy of macOS Why? It’s best to start clean, to avoid previous misconfiguration. How? Follow this Apple Support guide ( Intel-based↗ , Apple silicon↗ ).

hacker_news.content_context:

Understanding the molecular changes underlying aging is important for developing biomarkers and healthy aging interventions. In this study, the authors used comprehensive multi-omics data to reveal nonlinear molecular profiles across chronological ages, highlighting two substantial variations observed around ages 40 and 60, which are linked to increased disease risks.

Nature Aging volume 4 , pages 1619–1634 ( 2024 ) Cite this article Aging is a complex process associated with nearly all diseases. Understanding the molecular changes underlying aging and identifying therapeutic targets for aging-related diseases are crucial for increasing healthspan. Although many studies have explored linear changes during aging, the prevalence of aging-related diseases and mortality risk accelerates after specific time points, indicating th... Aging is a complex and multifactorial process of physiological changes strongly associated with various human diseases, including cardiovascular diseases (CVDs), diabetes, neurodegeneration and cancer 1 . The alterations of molecules (including transcripts, proteins, metabolites and cytokines) are critically important to understand the underlying mechanism of aging and discover potential therap...

HN comment: A recent study reveals that aging doesn't happen linearly or gradually, but actually undergoes some major jumps around age 44 and 60.
